Var.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
Var.purpose: Optional BYOK cloud AI in production builds

Var.name: VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
Var.purpose: Google OAuth client ID in production builds

Var.name: PCGR_TCGPLAYER_EMAIL
Var.purpose: Optional TCGplayer automation login

Var.name: PCGR_TCGPLAYER_PASSWORD
Var.purpose: Optional TCGplayer automation login

Var.name: DB_HOST
Var.purpose: Hosted API MySQL host — production config.php only

Var.name: DB_NAME
Var.purpose: Primary grader database — production config.php only

Var.name: MARKETPLACE_DB_NAME
Var.purpose: Optional marketplace plugin DB — production config.php only

Var.name: GITHUB_REPO
Var.purpose: Public repository

Var.name: acq_price
Var.purpose: Purchase price — stripped from verify.php for non-owners

Var.name: acq_tax
Var.purpose: Tax paid — stripped from verify.php for non-owners

Var.name: acq_shipping
Var.purpose: Shipping cost — stripped from verify.php for non-owners

Var.name: acq_date
Var.purpose: Acquisition date

Var.name: acq_source
Var.purpose: Vendor or marketplace source

Var.name: acq_city
Var.purpose: Source city from provenance or envelope OCR

Var.name: acq_state
Var.purpose: Source state from provenance or envelope OCR

Var.name: tracking_number
Var.purpose: Shipment tracking — stripped from verify.php for non-owners

Var.name: order_id
Var.purpose: Order or invoice ID — stripped from verify.php for non-owners

Var.name: user_notes
Var.purpose: Vault notes — stripped from verify.php for non-owners

Var.name: envelope_receipt_img
Var.purpose: Opt-in receipt image — stripped from verify.php for non-owners

Var.name: parent_id
Var.purpose: Provenance lineage link between vault copies

Var.name: market_price_json
Var.purpose: Unlocked market data — ledger export respects unlock keys
